sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51069" key="i)so/kuklos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-κυκλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51069.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equally round</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
